ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude of the site in meters */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use category (e.g., urban, rural, forest) */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., urban, rural, background) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., ppm, ug/m3) */,
  "health_effects" TEXT /* Health effects of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the equipment is installed */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., analyzer, sensor) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the data was collected */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant being measured */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the pollutant concentration */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., ppm, ug/m3) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_values" (
  "aqi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQI value */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point used to calculate the AQI */,
  "aqi_value" INTEGER /* AQI value */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the AQI value (e.g., Good, Moderate, Unhealthy) */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Health impact of the AQI value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aqi_values_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cbsa_codes" (
  "cbsa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CBSA code */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* CBSA code */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the CBSA */,
  "cbsa_type" TEXT /* Type of CBSA (e.g., metropolitan, micropolitan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cbsa_codes_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_codes" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state code */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., West, South) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_codes_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_codes" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county code */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_codes_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poc" (
  "poc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each POC */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "poc_name" TEXT /* Name of the POC */,
  "poc_email" TEXT /* Email address of the POC */,
  "poc_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the POC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poc_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_obs_count" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation count */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the observation count was recorded */,
  "obs_count" INTEGER /* Number of observations for the day */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the observation count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_obs_count_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percent_complete" (
  "complete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percent complete value */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the percent complete value was recorded */,
  "percent_complete" TEXT /* Percent complete value */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the percent complete value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percent_complete_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES monitoring_equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., valid, invalid, missing) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)
